name: browser-automation
description: Control a real browser — navigate, click, type, screenshot, read page content. Providers bridge Claude Code to a user's actual browser session with full interaction capabilities.

behavior.input: Actions like navigate, click, type, screenshot with CSS selectors and URLs
behavior.output: Page content, screenshots, element info, or confirmation of interaction
behavior.deterministic: Actions execute against the live browser state — results depend on page content
